name: stratum
description: Software architecture modeling, evaluation, and Structurizr DSL generation based on C4 model methodology. Use when C4 model design or visualization is needed.

capabilities.summary: Auto-extract C4 model elements (System/Container/Component) from codebases
Identify and define system boundaries, actors, and external dependencies
Identify containers based on runtime boundaries and map their relationships
Analyze component responsibilities and interactions within containers
Generate and maintain models as Structurizr DSL code
Verify consistency across C4 levels (L1-L4) and detect discrepancies
Design System Landscape, Dynamic, and Deployment supplementary diagrams
Incrementally update C4 models as systems change with diff tracking
